summary: Backend API testing for social platform - All 27 tests passed. Tested: home feed with location-based prioritization, artist profile with geocoding, business location updates, events with datetime, user profile/friends/messages functionality.

minor.issue: Geocoding via Nominatim API fails intermittently due to rate limiting (509 Bandwidth Limit). Coordinates may be null when geocoding fails. This is a known limitation of free Nominatim service.

action_items: Consider implementing geocoding fallback or caching to handle Nominatim rate limits
Add logging when geocoding fails to help with debugging
critical_code_review_comments: Geocoding function (geocode_town) silently returns None on rate limit errors. Recommend adding explicit error logging with rate limit detection.
ArtistUpdate model does not include latitude/longitude fields, so coordinates can only be set via auto-geocoding or during creation
seed_data_creation: Created test user, artist profile, and test events/activities during testing. Cleanup runs automatically after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs are fully functional. All tested endpoints working: /api/feed/home (location-based), /api/artists (CRUD + geocoding), /api/businesses (CRUD + location), /api/events (CRUD with datetime), /api/users (profile, friends, messages), /api/activities (CRUD with datetime/location). Note: Nominatim geocoding may return null due to rate limits.
rca_of_the_issue: No critical issues found. Geocoding rate limit is an external service limitation, not a bug in the code.
